hero.title: ROCSAUT
hero.subtitle: Taiwanese Student Association at University of Toronto
hero.description: Connecting Taiwanese students in Toronto to grow and support each other.

about.title: About Us
about.paragraph1: ROCSAUT (The Republic of China Student Association at University of Toronto) is the Taiwanese student association at the University of Toronto, founded in 2020.
about.paragraph2: We are dedicated to providing a warm sense of belonging for Taiwanese students studying in Toronto, helping members integrate into campus life through various activities and resources.
about.paragraph3: Whether it's academic exchange, cultural promotion, or social activities, we welcome your participation.

home.footerDescription: ROCSAUT is the Taiwanese student association at the University of Toronto, dedicated to connecting Taiwanese students in Toronto to grow and support each other.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have any questions or proposals? Feel free to reach out through the following channels.
